beats.intent: Mateo wakes up to a cryptic message from an unknown sender
Mateo tries to decipher the message, feeling uneasy
Mateo heads to work, lost in thought
Mateo starts his day at the office, checking emails and reports
Mateo's coworker, Javi, teases him about his lack of social life
Dr. Baeza briefs Mateo on a new project, involving an innovative encryption method
Mateo senses that Dr. Baeza is hiding something about the project
Mateo meets Zoë at a café, discussing their plans for the weekend
Chief Ortega summons Mateo to her office, regarding a sensitive matter
Mateo learns about a potential security breach in the company's system
Mateo starts investigating the breach, following a trail of digital clues
Mateo feels like he's being watched, noticing strange coincidences
Mateo tries to shake off the feeling of unease, but can't sleep
Mateo discovers a hidden message on his computer, hinting at a larger conspiracy
Mateo meets Marina, who's working late, and they share a laugh about their jobs
Mateo confronts Dr. Baeza about the hidden message and the project's true purpose
